---
title: "Building production function from scratch"
description: "My personal notes on production function estimation in IO"
date: "2026-04-21"
toc: false
categories:
  - study
---

# Notes

These are my personal notes on my understanding of production function and its estimation in IO. Note that this is a living document and will be updated as I learn more things.

## Why production function?

Simple. Most papers in trade and other important papers are "production function" papers.
